label: Legitimate Control Decision Receipt
description: TSMM-native evidence model for proving that a consequential action was taken under legitimate control.

nodes.label: Legitimate control evidence domain
nodes.description: Domain for receipts proving that control-side checks were satisfied before or during action.

nodes.label: Control requirement policy
nodes.description: Policy describing which control-side proofs are required.

nodes.label: Action gate decision
nodes.description: Decision to allow, deny, or escalate the action.

nodes.label: Control decision receipt
nodes.description: Evidence bundle containing legitimacy, attribution, and remediation references.

nodes.label: Trace reconstruction assessment
nodes.description: Assessment that reconstructs causal contribution for the action.

nodes.label: Remediation state effect
nodes.description: Captures whether rollback, escalation, or compensation path is available.

nodes.label: Receipt consumer
nodes.description: Verifier or auditor that validates the receipt after action.

edges.description: Control requirement policy constrains the action gate decision.
Action gate decision emits the receipt.
Trace reconstruction informs the receipt with attributable reasoning context.
Action gate decision records remediation posture.
Auditor or verifier validates the receipt after the fact.
Service relies on the gate decision before committing action.
